concerns.detail: Full name of a student/subordinate (Zhiyang Duo) in a professor's group is disclosed, identifying a private individual who is not the subject of the document.
concerns.excerpt: 他组里的 Zhiyang Duo 非常能灌，到处合作，臭名昭著

concerns.detail: Unsupported character judgment using derogatory language (臭名昭著) against a specific student.
concerns.excerpt: Zhiyang Duo 非常能灌，到处合作，臭名昭著

concerns.detail: Personal attack against a commenter (claiming they are 'triggered' or defensive) rather than addressing the substance of the discussion.
concerns.excerpt: bro被说破防了，你删我也删，此为prof榜，少在这性别歧视
